description: Style NoteThis red T-shirt from lee is love-forever classic that's sure to become a wardrobe favourite in no time. Lee has the ability to polish classics with a contemporary vibe. Complement the enthusiasm of this tee with a pair of blue or grey denim jeans.Product DetailsRed round neck T-shirt with short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coolDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or dry in shadeLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (Height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
